name: deleteForumTopic
description: Use this method to delete a forum topic along with all its messages in a forum supergroup chat or a private chat with a user. In the case of a supergroup chat the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_delete_messages administrator rights

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

parameters.name: message_thread_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic
